mano_cua.result_summary: Bug确认：在demos/confirm-delete-dialog页面，打开AlertDialog后点击Cancel按钮，shadcn-svelte卡片从页面消失——Cancel错误触发了删除操作（onConfirm被执行）。页面未刷新/跳转（URL不变），但删除操作在客户端被错误执行。ConfirmDeleteDialog组件内<form method=POST>的Cancel按钮虽有type=button但仍触发了删除。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Bug confirmed: clicking Cancel in the AlertDialog incorrectly triggers the delete action. The 'shadcn-svelte' card was removed from the page after clicking Cancel. The form's onsubmit handler calls dialogState.confirm() (the delete action). Cancel button has type='button' but still triggers the delete in the buggy commit.
